title: HPACK & QPACK Compression
description: Analyze the mechanisms of HPACK header compression in HTTP/2. Implement strategies for minimizing header overhead using HPACK and QPACK dynamic tables. Compare the compression techniques and benefits of HPACK and QPACK.
objectives: Analyze the mechanisms of HPACK header compression in HTTP/2.
Implement strategies for minimizing header overhead using HPACK and QPACK dynamic tables.
Compare the compression techniques and benefits of HPACK and QPACK.
